mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_task_attachment (task_id, user_id, original_file_name, stored_file_name, content_type, file_size, file_type, storage_path, file_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{userId}, #{originalFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{storagePath}, #{fileUrl}, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, user_id AS userId, original_file_name AS originalFileName, stored_file_name AS storedFileName, content_type AS contentType, file_size AS fileSize, file_type AS fileType, storage_path AS storagePath, file_url AS fileUrl, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM review_task_attachment WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id ASC
